prompt: Create a high-quality pixel art anime illustration of a young adult woman relaxing in a bathtub at night. She has deep navy blue shoulder-length messy bob hair with long strands and bangs, wet and slightly clinging to her face and neck. Her eyes are closed, expression calm and peaceful, head tilted slightly upward, with one hand raised behind her head as if combing through her wet hair. Show only her head, neck, bare shoulders, upper arms, and the top of her chest mostly hidden by opaque bathwater and foam; keep the scene tasteful and non-explicit. The setting is a cozy tiled bathroom with pale green-gray wall tiles, a large dark-framed window on the left showing a moonlit night sky and leafy trees outside, and soft reflections on the glass. On the right rear ledge, include exactly 2 bath bottles: one tall blue pump bottle and one shorter pink rectangular bottle. The bathtub water is muted turquoise with shimmering highlights, small ripples, and scattered white foam along the edges. Use a nostalgic 16-bit / 32-bit pixel art style with visible square pixels, soft dithering, limited color palette, gentle bloom lighting, and warm indoor bathroom illumination mixed with cool blue moonlight. Composition is a close-up bust view centered on the woman, 4:3 landscape canvas, intimate tranquil atmosphere, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
